zh.Evesham, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾艾維沙安
zh.Kinwarton, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾金瓦頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Randulph de Coughton於1135年出生在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓時，他的父親William de Coughton III28歲，母親Anne De Cocton24歲。他於1157年與Christian Cocton在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1184年在他的家鄉享年49歲。

zh-hans.Kinwarton, Warwickshire, England: 英国瓦維其可爾金瓦頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Randulph de Coughton于1135年出生在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓时，他的父亲William de Coughton III28岁，母亲Anne De Cocton24岁。他于1157年与Christian Cocton在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1184年在他的家乡享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Coughton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English:

habitational name from any of numerous places called Houghton or Hoghton. Most of the placenames derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have different etymologies; for example, Little Houghton in Eccles (Lancashire), which derives from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn, and Houghton in Bigbury (Devon), which may derive from an Old English personal name Huhha + Old English tūn.
variant of   Haughton  .

variants.name: Haughton
meanings: English: habitational name from Haughton (Cheshire, Lancashire, Northumberland, Shropshire, Staffordshire), or Haughton le Skerne (Durham). The placenames derive from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Houghton .
Irish: adopted for Ó hEacháin ‘descendant of Eachán’, a pet form of the personal name Eachaidh (see Hoey ).
Irish: adopted for Ó hEachtair ‘descendant of Eachtair’, a personal name of uncertain origin. Compare Hoctor .

variants.name: Howton
meanings: English (London): variant of   Houghton  .

variants.name: Hufton
meanings: English: habitational name; probably from Stony Houghton in Pleasley (Derbyshire), the name of which derives from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Houghton .

nameMeanings.name: Randulph
meanings: Properly Radolph, the same as the German names Radulph, Radolf, Hroadolf, RudoIph; from Old German rad-ulph, help or counsel. The nickname is Rann.

variants.name: Rudolph
meanings: From a Latinized version, Rudolphus, of the Germanic name Hrōdwulf ( see Rolf ). It was introduced to the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century. Rudolf was a hereditary name among the Habsburgs, the Holy Roman Emperors and rulers of Austria, from the Emperor Rudolf I ( 1218–91 ) to the Archduke Rudolf , Crown Prince of Austria-Hungary, who died in mysterious circumstances at his country house at Meyerling in 1889 . Rudolf Rassendyll was the central character of Anthony Hope's adventure stories The Prisoner of Zenda ( 1894 ) and Rupert of Hentzau ( 1898 ), in which he is an English gentleman who bears a great physical resemblance to the King of Ruritania, to whom he is distantly related. He successfully impersonates the king for reasons of state. In the early 20th century the popularity of this name was further enhanced by the American silent-film actor Rudolph Valentino ( 1895–1926 ), born in Italy as Rodolfo di Valentina d'Antonguolla . It has not been used much in recent times, perhaps being inextricably associated with ‘the red-nosed reindeer’ of the Christmas song.

en.lifeSummary: When Randulph de Coughton was born in 1135, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, his father, William de Coughton III, was 28 and his mother, Anne De Cocton, was 24. He married Christian Cocton in 1157, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1184, in his hometown, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Randulph de Coughton est né en 1135, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Coughton III, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Anne De Cocton, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Christian Cocton en 1157, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1184, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Randulph de Coughton 1135 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Coughton III 28 und seine Mutter Anne De Cocton 24. Er hat 1157 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England Christian Cocton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1184 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Randulph de Coughton è nato il nel 1135 nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, William de Coughton III, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Anne De Cocton, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Christian Cocton nel 1157, nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1184, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Randulph de Coughtonが1135年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで生まれた時，父William de Coughton IIIは28歳，母Anne De Coctonは24歳であった。1157年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンでChristian Coctonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1184年に故郷で49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Randulph de Coughton(이)가 1135년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Coughton III(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne De Cocton(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1157년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 Christian Cocton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1184년 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Randulph de Coughton nasceu em 1135, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Coughton III, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Anne De Cocton, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Christian Cocton em 1157, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1184, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Randulph de Coughton родился в 1135 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Coughton III было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne De Cocton, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Christian Cocton в 1157 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1184 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Randulph de Coughton nació en 1135, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Coughton III, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Anne De Cocton, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Christian Cocton en 1157, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1184, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años.
